_comment: Per-pack node class name transforms applied when rendering capability index entries. keys are the exact registry id (the backtick value in capability files, same as the uv pip install name); values are the literal string to remove from every matching node class name.

strip_suffix._comment: keys are registry ids; values are literal suffix strings to remove from every matching node class name.

strip_prefix._comment: keys are registry ids; values are literal preffix strings to remove from every matching node class name.
